CustomField.formula: IF( AND(ISBLANK(Actual_Completion_Date__c), TODAY() > Estimated_End_Date__c), "Overdue", IF( AND( ISBLANK(Actual_Completion_Date__c), Project_Completion_Status__c < 0.75, (Estimated_End_Date__c - TODAY()) < 30 ), "At Risk", IF( AND( ISBLANK(Actual_Completion_Date__c), Project_Completion_Status__c >= 0.75, (Estimated_End_Date__c - TODAY()) < 30 ), "Nearly Complete", IF( AND(ISBLANK(Actual_Completion_Date__c), (Estimated_End_Date__c - TODAY()) >= 30), "On Track", IF( AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Actual_Completion_Date__c)), Actual_Completion_Date__c > Estimated_End_Date__c), "Completed, but Delayed", IF( AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Actual_Completion_Date__c)), Actual_Completion_Date__c <= Estimated_End_Date__c), "Completed On Time", "" ))))))
CustomField.label: Project Health
